subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath ever been in the heights of exaltation, grandeur and majesty, and Who shall continue to be even as He hath been [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی کان فی علو الرفعه و العظمه و الجلال و یکون بمثل ما قد کان
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @law of Huququ'llah, @consolation and comfort, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
